package_concept: dense exterior column-corridor contact combat with no structural breakage, revised after ChatGPT K116 content audit
chatgpt_audit_revisions_applied: global contact beats require visible body outcome
no more than 0.20s-0.25s pure adjustment between contact beats
last 0.8s requires at least two clear contact beats
column segment forbids full circling and large side-switching
railing shake requires real body/forearm/shoulder pressure
face stability emphasizes medium-readable 3/4 views and stable hair/costume language
route_summary: single exterior veranda / column corridor / railing zone, high contact density, no structural breakage
continuity_source: SHOT-03-V003 failed for action density, weak impact, wrong wood crack causality, setup-heavy movement, and idle tail

references.label: @FENSHOU_UPLOADSAFE
references.duty: Fenshou identity only. Black/red armored male warrior, face, hair, armor, silhouette, body type, aggressive forward pressure.

references.label: @SHUANGJI_UPLOADSAFE
references.duty: Highest-priority Shuangji female identity protection only. Female face, female identity, silver-blue high ponytail, blue-silver armor collar/shoulders, white-blue robe panels. Do not use as action/rhythm/scene/camera reference.

references.label: @TEMPLE_SCENE_UPLOADSAFE
references.duty: Rainy ancient temple exterior/veranda world only: frontal main-hall axis, exterior corridor, column line, railing, wet stone floor, exterior eaves, courtyard rain, cold gray-blue rainy mood. Do not use as character identity reference.

route_timing_design.beat: immediate forearm crash beside wet column
route_timing_design.contact_point: Fenshou right forearm to Shuangji left guard, not face
route_timing_design.required_body_result: Shuangji shoulder turns back, rear foot skids, water splashes, both arms rebound

route_timing_design.contact_point: palm heel to Fenshou shoulder armor
route_timing_design.required_body_result: Fenshou torso turns off-line, rear boot scrapes water, immediate forward drive
railing shakes only from real pressure, Shuangji braces and pivots back into guard

route_timing_design.beat: Shuangji low-line step trap tied to upper-body contact
route_timing_design.required_body_result: Fenshou lead foot slips briefly then recovers into continued pressure
Shuangji guard buckles inward, shoulder jolts, compact counter rebounds

route_timing_design.beat: two fast contact beats beside column
route_timing_design.column_rule: no full circling, no large side-switching; column is brief half-body occlusion and movement line only
route_timing_design.required_body_result: Fenshou presses, Shuangji redirects and counters, Fenshou recoils and re-enters

route_timing_design.railing_rule: railing may shake/flex only when body, forearm, or shoulder actually presses it
route_timing_design.required_body_result: Shuangji half-step side shift, rebound counter, Fenshou keeps pressure

route_timing_design.beat: two final contact beats and mid-exchange cut
route_timing_design.required_body_result: attack, guard, recoil, re-entry remain active in final frame
route_timing_design.forbidden_tail: no defense-only tail, no observation, no pose-out, no footwork-only adjustment

allowed_non_structural_feedback: railing shake only under real body/forearm/shoulder pressure
lantern/banner/hanging cloth brushed by body airflow or proximity

face_identity_stability_requirements: faces should not be hidden for long by arms, columns, or rain lines
preserve Shuangji as female-coded with silver-blue high ponytail and blue-silver / white-blue costume language
preserve Fenshou as black-red armored male identity
next_phase_recommendation: SHOT-03-V004 package review, then human submit authorization only if approved
result_note: No-submit package only after ChatGPT K116 audit revisions; human review required before any live submit authorization.
